channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former AAP councillor Tahir Hussain convicted in IB officer Ankit Sharma murder case during Delhi riots
item.description: A Delhi court has convicted former Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) councillor Tahir Hussain and several others in the 2020 murder of Intelligence Bureau (IB) officer Ankit Sharma during the North East Delhi rio...

item.title: Sylvia Adusu becomes first African woman on ITLOS, marking a milestone for Ghana and Africa's role in global justice
item.description: Sylvia Ama Adusu, a Ghanaian lawyer, has made history by becoming the first African woman elected to the International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea (ITLOS). Her election marks a significant milesto...

item.title: Linus Torvalds Discusses Rust, C, and AI Tools for Code Verification
item.description: Linus Torvalds, the creator of Linux, shared his perspectives on programming languages and tools during a talk at the Open Source Summit India 2026. He emphasized his continued preference for C over R...

item.title: Saint Raphael Divine Mercy Specialist Hospital Offers Full-Service Maternal and Child Healthcare
item.description: Saint Raphael Divine Mercy Specialist Hospital provides a holistic approach to maternal and child healthcare, ensuring safety and quality from pregnancy to postnatal care. The hospital's services star...

item.title: Pakistan's Operation Shaban targets 117 terrorists in Balochistan since July 5
item.description: Security forces in Pakistan's Balochistan province have killed at least 117 terrorists since July 5, 2026, as part of Operation Shaban. The joint operation, led by the Pakistan Army, Frontier Corps, a...

item.title: Corruption in Victoria's Big Build project faces minimal government scrutiny
item.description: The article critically examines the Victoria government's Big Build infrastructure project, alleging widespread corruption and financial mismanagement. It highlights how the project's scale and the la...

item.title: Euthanasia in Canada: Addressing the Ethical and Social Implications After a Decade of Legalization
item.description: The article by Richard W. Smith critiques Canada's euthanasia policies, which have been legal since 2016. It highlights the human cost, noting over 100,000 deaths attributed to the practice. Smith rec...

item.title: Apple AirPods Pro 3 Offer Significant Upgrades and Competitive Pricing
item.description: The Apple AirPods Pro 3 represent a major advancement in wireless earbuds, featuring enhanced active noise cancellation (ANC) that is twice as effective as the previous generation. These earbuds also ...

item.title: Parliament intervenes in Legal Aid SA labour dispute amid stalled negotiations and financial challenges
item.description: Parliament has stepped into the escalating labour dispute at Legal Aid South Africa, aiming to mediate between management and workers' representatives. The intervention follows a two-day protected str...

item.title: Impeachment Trial of VP Duterte Advances with Strong Evidence from NBI Testimony
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte is gaining momentum as National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) witness Jeremy Lotoc's testimony reinforces the prosecution's case. House prosecutor ...

item.title: UK Designates Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps as Terrorist Organization
item.description: The United Kingdom has announced its decision to classify Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) as a terrorist organization, imposing sanctions on the paramilitary group. This move follows i...

item.title: Roughriders Defense Ends Turnover Drought with Victory Over Ti-Cats
item.description: The Regina Roughriders made history in their matchup against the Ti-Cats by finally ending a long-standing turnover drought. This victory marked a pivotal moment for the team, which had struggled with...

item.title: Monica Mkandla eyes world title after decisive victory
item.description: Monica Mkandla, the 26-year-old Zimbabwean boxer trained in Edenvale by Vusi Mtolo, has secured a sixth-round stoppage win against Simamkele Tutsheni, boosting her prospects for a world title. Her man...

item.title: Sam Neill: A Legacy of Subtle Excellence in Film
item.description: Sam Neill, the acclaimed Australian actor who passed away at 78, left an indelible mark on cinema through his nuanced performances. Born Nigel John Dermot Neill in Northern Ireland, he moved to New Ze...

item.title: Evidence from Nine African Countries Shows Youth Employment Programmes Need Better Funding, Stronger Institutions and Closer Links to Employers
item.description: Africa has one of the youngest populations in the world, creating both a major opportunity and a serious challenge for governments. The article argues that youth employment programmes across nine Afri...

item.title: USWNT to Face Spain, 2023 World Cup Champions, in October Friendlies
item.description: The U.S. women’s national team (USWNT) has announced plans to host Spain, the reigning Women's World Cup champions and currently top-ranked team globally, in a pair of friendly matches this October. T...

item.title: Health experts warn of rising anaplasmosis cases and urge early treatment
item.description: A new study published in the Canadian Medical Association Journal highlights the growing threat of anaplasmosis, a tick-borne illness often mistaken for Lyme disease. Dr. Michael Quon, an internal med...

item.title: US National Arrested at Nepal Border for Entering India Without Documents
item.description: An American national, Jordan Brown, was detained by the Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) near the India-Nepal border in Uttar Pradesh's Mainihwa area. According to police, Brown entered India via a sea route...

item.title: Field Marshal Asim Munir's Two-Day Official Visit to Turkiye Focuses on Defense Cooperation
item.description: Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir, Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of Army Staff (COAS), has arrived in Turkiye for a two-day official visit, according to state media. During his visit, he is set ...

item.title: Trinity Tatum and Bryce Dettloff Win Love Island USA Season 8 with $100,000 Prize
item.description: Trinity Tatum and Bryce Dettloff have emerged as the winners of Love Island USA Season 8, beating three other couples in a dramatic finale. The couple, who were fan favorites throughout the competitio...
